package rulecoverage

func PositiveSortBeforeFirstOrMembershipOnly() string {
    ruleID := "sort_before_first_or_membership_only"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Sorting a collection when only the first element or min/max is needed."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
